mapper.select: SELECT AUTH_ID AS authId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode, AUTH_NAME AS authName, DESCRIPTION AS description FROM AUTHORITY_CODE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY AUTH_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}

SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.AUTH_ID AS authId, U.EMPLOYEE_ID AS employeeId, U.DEPARTMENT AS department, U.NAME AS name, U.BIRTH AS birth, U.PHONE AS phone, U.EMAIL AS email, U.ADDRESS AS address, U.HIRE_DATE AS hireDate, U.RETIRE_DATE AS retireDate, U.STATUS AS status, U.USE_YN AS useYn, U.REMARK AS remark, U.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, U.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, A.AUTH_CODE AS authCode, A.AUTH_NAME AS authName FROM USERS U JOIN AUTHORITY_CODE A ON U.AUTH_ID = A.AUTH_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET AUTH_ID = #{authId}, DEPARTMENT = #{department}, NAME = #{name}, BIRTH = #{birth}, PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, ADDRESS = #{address}, HIRE_DATE = #{hireDate}, RETIRE_DATE = #{retireDate}, STATUS = #{status}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.AUTH_ID AS authId, U.EMPLOYEE_ID AS employeeId, U.PASSWORD AS password, U.NAME AS name, U.DEPARTMENT AS department, U.STATUS AS status, U.USE_YN AS useYn, A.AUTH_CODE AS authCode, A.AUTH_NAME AS authName FROM USERS U JOIN AUTHORITY_CODE A ON U.AUTH_ID = A.AUTH_ID WHERE U.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}
